title: Royalford Insulated Cooler Box - Hot/Cold Freezer Box with Integrated Lock Lid and Carry Handle - Ideal for Beach and Picnic
features: STAYS ICE COLD - The insulated cooler has 3 layer thermal insulation that keeps this ice box cold for long hours; It's ideal for camping, fishing, picnics, or your everyday work lunch box.
PORTABLE CHILLER ICE BOX - with high performance insulation to keep contents chilled for up to long hours, works ideal when you keep chilled food/drinks along with ice cubes or freezer packs.

CHOOSE FROM 5L TO 62L – Ideal for camping picnic trips or for work use for Food & Drinks Container. Also ideal to conveniently carry tiffin boxes for kids, lunch boxes, bento boxes for office or school; this insulated cool box is also a ideal alternative for cooler bags as it has a higher performance. the cooler is perfect for long road trips, days spent on the campsite, or even sporting events.
ROBUST, COMPACT – Made from ultra-strong PP material making it more than suitable for the rigours of travel. A nice compact size for easy storage and transportation.
CARRY HANDLE - The carry handles have been added to make moving the cooler box very easily. The material is also lightweight for easy carrying.
description: Royalford Insulated Cooler Box Insulated Hot Box/Cold Freezer Box Cooler Boxes Integrated Lock Lid with Carry Handle Cool Box Cooler Box Hard Insulated Beach Picnic Box
